codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: Dashboard pending items prefill chat via setChatInput without sending, active pages call openWikiPage for Wiki tab navigation, MessageText-driven chat-to-wiki behavior remains wired through App, and tab panels are kept mounted to preserve UI state across tab switches.

summary: Reviewed feature panel-wiring using feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. No actionable defects were found in the implemented scope.
